title: meta-diagnostics config
description: Saved at ~/.meta-diagnostics-config.json. Written by /meta-diagnostics on first run.

deps_checked.description: True once Python + pip + streamlit/plotly/pandas/requests have been confirmed installed.

account_id.description: Meta ad account ID. Should begin with act_ (e.g. act_123456789).

conversion_event.description: The Meta conversion event being optimized (e.g. purchase, lead, complete_registration).

conversion_label.description: Plain-English business label for the conversion event (e.g. 'paid subscription sign-up').

winner_threshold.description: Minimum lifetime spend (USD) for an ad to be considered a winner. Default: 3000.

spend_tier.description: Derived from average monthly spend. Calculated and cached by the skill.
